comment: PEDAL BUILD manifest for Corrupt (2-knob, v1 = square master + sub octave, zero-crossing pitch tracking). build.py reads THIS file; manifest.json is the 6-knob desktop-preview manifest. Harmony/FM are deferred.
gid_comment: 0x03 = Drive -> SONAME prefix ZDL_DRV_. On MS-70CDR a custom Drive effect may need a stock Drive installed to appear in the device browser.
audio_nop_comment: Set true for a UI-only smoke build before trusting the DSP.
